title: Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple
tagline: Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Gunaseelam Vishnu Temple (Abhimana Sthalam) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Gunaseelam village, 20 km (12 mi) from Trichy, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Gunaseelam Vishnu Temple (Abhimana Sthalam) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Gunaseelam village, 20 km (12 mi) from Trichy, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the banks of river Kaveri. It is Classified one among the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition. A visit to the temple is believed to be a cure for the mentally challenged people, who are taken to the temple and kept in the temple premises for 48 days.

topPlaces.name: Paraithurainathar temple
topPlaces.description: The Paraithurainathar Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Thirupparaithurai, Karur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity Paraithurainathar, a form of Shiva, is revered in the Tevaram, written by the Tamil saint-poets known as the Nayanmars.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (22 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Prasanna Venkatachalapathy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gunaseelam, Manjakkorai, Pettavaithalai, Paraithurainathar temple, Perugamani.
